message:
refactor(extension_popularity): borrow-based parse_owner_repo + comprehensive tests

Refactor parse_owner_repo to accept &str instead of owned Strings,
eliminating unnecessary allocations at 6 call sites (github_repo_
candidate_from_url, github_repo_guesses_from_slug, parse_owner_repo_
from_path). Add Eq derive to GitHubRepoMetrics, NpmDownloads, and
NpmRegistryMeta for use in test assertions.

Add ~450 lines of unit tests covering:
- GitHubRepoRef::full_name
- github_repo_candidate_from_url: HTTPS, git+https, git@scp,
  bare domain, with .git suffix, trailing slashes, subpaths,
  organization-only slugs, non-GitHub hosts
- github_repo_guesses_from_slug: simple split, pi-prefix convention,
  single-segment fallback, deduplication
- parse_npm_downloads_response: happy path, zero values, missing
  fields, empty JSON, malformed JSON
- parse_npm_registry_response: full metadata, missing optional fields,
  empty/malformed JSON
- fetch_npm_registry_meta: 404 returns None
- NpmDownloads formatting and edge cases

Also apply rustfmt to cohere.rs and gemini.rs provider files (line
wrapping on chained method calls and match arms). Refine auth.rs
test match arm to explicitly name OAuth variant instead of wildcard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
